title: Pinterest Q3 2022 Earnings Report
text: Pinterest shares soared on third-quarter revenue beat as it bucks the online ads trend. The company delivered strong Q3 2022 results. Earnings came in at 11 cents per share (adjusted) vs. 6 cents per share (adjusted) expected, and revenue was $684.6 million vs. $666.7 million expected. Pinterest shares jumped over 14% after the company posted third-quarter earnings that beat on both revenue and earnings per share. The beat was particularly significant given broader challenges in the online advertising industry where many companies were reporting softer results. For Q2 2022, analysts were modeling for revenue to increase 15% year over year to $728.7 million and adjusted EPS to decline 36% to $0.18. FactSet analyst estimates predicted an EPS consensus of $0.61 and a sales consensus of $2.8bn for the fiscal year ending December 2022. The strong Q3 performance demonstrated Pinterest's ability to maintain momentum despite challenging advertising market conditions.
